response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analysis: Identified performers as Hololive English VTubers Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin. 2. Identified song title 'CCGG Madness' via search tool and background text. 3. Confirmed it is an original song with no publicly available official lyrics. 4. Split video into scenes based on performance/talk transitions, ensuring all fields are present and end time is within limits.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance by Hololive English VTubers Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin, featuring their song 'CCGG Madness' along with interactive talk segments.
